required_preferences.fact: Responds to urgent internal and cross-department messages during both peak hours and late evenings on Tuesdays and Thursdays due to recurring strategy calls — restricts after-hours replies on other days

supersedes.fact: Responds to urgent internal messages only during peak hours (9am-2pm) — avoids after-hours replies unless critical

required_preferences.fact: Pauses all jogging and walking-based exercise; switches exclusively to stationary cycling or swimming three evenings weekly, as recommended for plantar fasciitis recovery

supersedes.fact: Replaces morning jogs with low-impact evening walks on Tuesdays, Thursdays, or Saturdays — avoids vigorous morning exercise due to migraine risk

required_preferences.fact: Preps extra portions of dinner to have leftovers for busy workdays — prioritizes meals that reheat well
Plans a dedicated 30-minute 'unplug' ritual after every late international meeting to manage stress and maintain migraine prevention routines
Always video-calls parents on the first Saturday of each month — never misses, even when traveling
Watches one documentary every weekend — never watches reality TV

persona: A 28-year-old customer support manager at a multinational e-commerce company
